feed.title: Cheung Shun Kong
feed.subtitle: A simple, whitespace theme for academics. Based on [*folio](https://github.com/bogoli/-folio) design.

entry.title: Adjusting the angle of the sample with Hx and Hz field

link.title: Adjusting the angle of the sample with Hx and Hz field

entry.content:
Adjusting the angle of the sample with Hx and Hz field

An easy way to adjust the sample in the magnetic field.
entry.summary: A systematic way to adjust the angle of the sample
